results.title: Anomalous Health Incidents and the Health Incident Response ...
excerpts: The issue of Anomalous Health Incidents (AHI) – including the interagency effort to protect and care for our personnel and uncover the cause of these incidents – is an absolute priority for the Department, including its most senior leaders.

results.title: Health Incident Response Task Force - United States ...
excerpts: Every day, as thousands of U.S. diplomats and development experts work hard for us, we must do all we can to protect their health, safety, and security. That’s certainly the case when it comes to addressing the threat posed by Anomalous Health Incidents.

results.title: Complementary Efforts on Anomalous Health Incidents
excerpts: The U.S. Government is continuing its efforts to get to the bottom of Anomalous Health Incidents (AHIs) and to care for those affected. We will continue to release information to our workforce and the public as our initiatives begin to bear fruit on key outstanding questions.

results.title: Updated Assessment of Anomalous Health Incidents - DNI
excerpts: Today, ODNI published the Intelligence Community Assessment, “Updated Assessment of Anomalous Health Incidents,” which includes information on the Intelligence Community’s targeting and investigative efforts on Anomalous Health Incidents.

  Academies of Sciences, Engineering, and Medicine are the nation's pre-eminent source of high-quality, objective advice on science, engineering, and health matters.

## Privacy Preference Center

When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.  
[More information](https://cookiepedia.co.uk/giving-consent-to-cookies)
